name: climbx-mcp
description: Publish and schedule X posts, read analytics, voice profile, learnings, and outlier feeds via the ClimbX API.
long_description: An MCP server for the ClimbX (climbx.so) API. Publish and schedule X posts through your connected account, read your analytics by format and niche, fetch your voice profile and derived learnings, and pull outlier posts from the inspiration feeds (creators you track plus network discovery). Community project, not affiliated with ClimbX. Requires a ClimbX account on an active plan or trial and an API key created under Settings > API.

api_key.title: ClimbX API key
api_key.description: Create one in the ClimbX app under Settings > API (the full key is shown only once).

tools.name: publish_post
tools.description: Publish a post to X immediately

tools.name: schedule_post
tools.description: Queue a post for a future time

tools.name: get_format_performance
tools.description: Format table with medians and trends

tools.name: get_niche_performance
tools.description: Niche table with medians and trends

tools.name: get_learnings_history
tools.description: Snapshots of the learnings set over time

tools.name: get_inspiration_options
tools.description: Accepted filter values and tracked creators

tools.name: get_following_outliers
tools.description: Outlier posts from creators you track

tools.name: suggest_reply
tools.description: Draft one reply suggestion in the owner's voice
